landing: Good ratings cluster on fast, helpful replies — across onboarding, account access, aliases, and appointments. The support experience is landing well.
not_landing: The few bad ratings are product gaps, not support quality — a couple misdirected, plus an open aliases bug and a data-deletion follow-up. The DKIM/deliverability issue already flipped positive after eng shipped a fix (kudos). Caveat: a good CSAT doesn't undo a pricing complaint — one happy customer still flagged price as a risk.
